title: solanum corymbiflorum subsp. corymbiflorum
intro: Solanum corymbiflorum subsp. corymbiflorum, also known as the 'Tambalisa', is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae, native to Madagascar. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum corymbiflorum subsp. corymbiflorum include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
